---
name: Terminology change request
about: Propose adding, changing, or retiring a term in the controlled EN/PT glossary
title: "[docs][glossary] "
labels: type:docs
---

**English term:**

**Current approved Portuguese term (if any):**

**Proposed Portuguese term:**

**Reason for the change:** (e.g. inconsistent usage found across repos, a
term is a false cognate, financial/legal meaning was distorted, Angola/
Lusophone institutional audience expects different wording)

**Repositories/contexts where this term appears:**

**Should this term ever be translated, or does it stay in English?**
(see `cubeshackles/docs/GLOSSARY.en-pt.md` "Explicitly not forced into
Portuguese")

This is a proposal only — the glossary is centrally governed per
`cubeshackles/docs/LOCALIZATION_POLICY.md`. A change here does not take
effect until merged into `cubeshackles/docs/GLOSSARY.en-pt.md`.
